title: campomanesia eriantha
intro: Campomanesia eriantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae, commonly known as a tree or shrub native to the Atlantic Forest of Brazil. The medicinal properties of Campomanesia eriantha include its ability to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and protect against oxidative stress. Campomanesia eriantha can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
